memoryArtifacts.headline: 1882. Hulse Family - The History of the County Palatine, Vol 3, Page 464
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 464, Vol III, 1882.
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages, Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾諾波利 白 斯托普特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl de Norbury於1318年出生在英國爾諾波利時，她的父親David de Norbury21歲，母親Ellen de Bickerton20歲。她於大約1337年與William Knight在英國英格蘭爾結婚。她去世於1342年在英國享年24歲。

zh-hans.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾諾波利 白 斯托普特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl de Norbury于1318年出生在英国爾諾波利时，她的父亲David de Norbury21岁，母亲Ellen de Bickerton20岁。她于大约1337年与William Knight在英国英格兰爾结婚。她去世于1342年在英国享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Norbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from any of various places so named, for example in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, and Surrey, so called from Old English north ‘north’ + burh ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl de Norbury was born in 1318, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, her father, David de Norbury, was 21 and her mother, Ellen de Bickerton, was 20. She married William Knight about 1337, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1342, in England, at the age of 24.

fr.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl de Norbury est née en 1318, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, David de Norbury, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Bickerton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Knight environ 1337, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1342, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl de Norbury 1318 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David de Norbury 21 und ihre Mutter Ellen de Bickerton 20. Sie hat um 1337 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William Knight geheiratet. Sie starb 1342 im Alter von 24 Jahren in England.

Lei sposato William Knight circa 1337, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1342, nel England, all'età di 24 anni.

ko.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이 비 스톡포트
ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Norbury(이)가 1318년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David de Norbury(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen de Bickerton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 William Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1342년 영국에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Norbury nasceu em 1318, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, David de Norbury, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Bickerton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Knight aproximadamente 1337, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1342, em Inglaterra, com 24 anos.

ru.Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England: норбури би стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl de Norbury родилась в 1318 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени David de Norbury было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Bickerton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Knight около 1337 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1342 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 24 лет.

Se casó con William Knight aproximadamente 1337, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1342, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años.
